title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across desktop, terminal, and VS Code environments. The example application generates personalized resumes and cover letters with skill suggestions and improvement recommendations, covering setup, installation, API integration, and debugging workflows.
